channel.title: Publications on Xing Lin
channel.description: Recent content in Publications on Xing Lin

item.title: Publications
item.description: PhD Dissertation Using Similarity in Content and Access Patterns to Improve Space Efficiency and Performance in Storage Systems [slides] Conference Papers SEFEE: Lightweight Storage Error Forecasting in Large Scale Enterprise Storage Systems Amirhesam Yazdi, Xing Lin, Lei Yang, Feng Yan SC 2020: International Conference for High Performance Computing, Networking, Storage and Analysis SS-CDC: A Two-stage Parallel Content-Defined Chunking for Deduplicating Backup Storage [slides :: bibtex] Fan Ni, Xing Lin, Song Jiang
